title: genista villosa
intro: Genista villosa, also known as hairy broom or Spanish gorse, is a flowering plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Genista villosa include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
